note: Updated 9 P/Invoke methods in NativeMethods.cs to use WgDeviceHandle instead of raw nint: DeviceConfigure, DeviceGetConfig, SocketOpen, Send, Recv, Poll, PeerAdd, PeerRemove, PeerList. Kept DeviceFree and SocketClose as raw nint (called from ReleaseHandle). Updated NativeMethodsMarshallingTests to validate SafeHandle types. Build passes, no new test failures.
